description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a prominent hip roof covered in dark shingles and a large wraparound wooden porch. The exterior walls are finished in light gray siding, complemented by white trim around the windows and roof edges. The house features a raised foundation with a set of stairs leading up to the main entryway, which is sheltered by a covered porch supported by wooden columns. Multiple windows, including a bay window on one side, provide ample natural light and architectural interest. The property is surrounded by a neatly landscaped yard with a stone pathway encircling the house. A brick chimney rises along one side, adding a classic touch to the overall design.
description: A single-story gray house with a hip roof, wraparound wooden porch, bay window, and landscaped stone pathways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side of the house with a bay window, the main porch, and the stairs leading up to the entryway.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of the house, highlighting the main entry porch, central chimney, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear side with the back porch, stairs, and additional windows, as well as the continuation of the stone pathway.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the opposite side with multiple windows and the full extent of the wraparound pathway, with the chimney visible at the far end.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with bay window and standard rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered wooden porch with steps, wooden columns, and a simple door with white trim.
